resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        prev_bit = n & 1
        n >>= 1
        while n:
            curr_bit = n & 1
            if curr_bit == prev_bit:
                return False
            prev_bit = curr_bit
            n >>= 1
        return True
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through the bits of the given integer from right to left, checking if each bit is different from the previous one. This approach takes advantage of bitwise operations to achieve high efficiency and low energy consumption.
